mapper.sql: id, code, name, title_template, content_template, type, channel, action_url_template, variables, description, priority, status, create_user_id, update_user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE type = #{type,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE type = #{type,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler} AND channel = #{channel,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM notification_template WHERE status = #{status,typeHandler=com.inkstage.handler.EnumCodeTypeHandler} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM notification_template WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_template ( code, name, title_template, content_template, type, channel, action_url_template, variables, description, priority, status, create_user_id, update_user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{titleTemplate}, #{contentTemplate}, #{type}, #{channel}, #{actionUrlTemplate}, #{variables}, #{description}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createUserId}, #{updateUserId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE notification_template
name = #{name}, title_template = #{titleTemplate}, content_template = #{contentTemplate}, type = #{type}, channel = #{channel}, action_url_template = #{actionUrlTemplate}, variables = #{variables}, description = #{description}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE notification_template SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
